message:
test(escape-parser): expand OSC and APC (Kitty) test coverage from 8 to 133 tests

Add 125 new tests across the OSC and APC parser modules:

osc.rs (+75 tests):
- ColorOrQuery: Display, Clone, Eq, Debug
- DynamicColorNumber: enum values, FromPrimitive roundtrip
- Selection bitflags: empty, combine, Display for all variants
- ChangeColorPair: Clone, Eq, Debug
- FinalTermClick: TryFrom<&str> roundtrip, Display for all variants
- FinalTermPromptKind: default, TryFrom, Display, roundtrip
- FinalTermSemanticPrompt Display: FreshLine, StartPrompt, B/I markers,
  CommandStatus with/without aid, MarkEndOfInput with/without aid
- Progress: Eq, Clone, Debug, ConEmu None variant
- ITermDimension: default, Display, parse (auto/cells/px/%), to_pixels,
  roundtrip
- ITermUnicodeVersionOp: set/push/push-label/pop parse tests
- OSC title variants: SetWindowTitle, SetIconName, SetIconNameSun, CWD
- OSC selection (52): clear/query/set
- OSC dynamic colors: foreground/background query, reset
- OSC Display: unspecified, selections
- ITermProprietary: SetMark/StealFocus/ClearScrollback/EndCopy/
  RequestCellSize/SetProfile/CopyToClipboard Display and parse
- OperatingSystemCommandCode: from_code, as_code

apc.rs (+50 tests):
- KittyImageVerbosity: from_keys (verbose/errors/quiet/invalid),
  Eq, Clone, to_keys roundtrip
- KittyImageFormat: from_keys (rgb/rgba/png/none/invalid), to_keys,
  Eq
- KittyImageCompression: from_keys (none/deflate/invalid), to_keys
- KittyImageData: Debug for all 5 variants, Eq, Clone
- KittyImageTransmit: from_keys basic, more_data_follows, Clone/Eq
- KittyImagePlacement: from_keys, do_not_move_cursor
- KittyImageDelete: all 10 variants (lowercase/uppercase), invalid
- KittyImage parse: query, display, delete; Display trait

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
